title: corybas dentatus
intro: Corybas dentatus, also known as the horned helmet orchid, is a unique and endangered species of orchid found in Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various digestive issues and as a natural anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Corybas dentatus include its ability to soothe stomach ulcers, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and constipation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
